title: abeec Wicked Diary Set | Official Wicked Themed Stationery Gift for Kids & Teens 3+ | Mirror Notebook, Gel Pens & Stickers | Magical Writing & Creative Fun for Fans
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: Magical journaling experience: Step into the world of Wicked with this officially themed diary set. Perfect for creative writing, sketching and note-taking — a thoughtful gift for fans who love the story of friendship and courage.

Complete creative set: Includes a mirror notebook, 4 gel pens with Wicked toppers, 2 metallic sticker sheets, 2 sticky note pads, and 3 mini gel pens. Everything is beautifully packed in a Wicked-themed envelope and gift box (25 × 20 × 3 cm, 0.38 kg).

Premium official merchandise: Designed for the upcoming Wicked film release — a must-have collectible for fans of the iconic musical. Each detail reflects the vibrant aesthetic and charm of the show’s timeless story.

Safe and child-friendly: CE/UKCA tested and suitable for ages 3 + (not for children under 36 months). Crafted from paper and cardboard with soft finishes, making it both safe and durable for everyday creative use.

Perfect Wicked gift idea: Ideal for birthdays, Christmas, stocking fillers, or as a back-to-school stationery treat. Inspires creativity, self-expression, and imaginative play — all wrapped in Wicked’s signature sparkle.
description: Product Description Unleash Creativity with the Wicked Diary Set Wicked Merchandise by abeec Wicked PYO Emerald City Wicked Jewellery Making Kit Wicked Diary Set Contents Emerald City, 2 x character figures, 12 x paints, brush, sticker sheets. Contents Alphabet & star beads, glitter accents, gold thread, and a Wicked storage case. Contents Notebook, 4 gel pens, 2 sticker sheets, 2 sticky note pads, & 3 mini gel pens. Ideal Use Christmas gifts, birthdays, craft days, Wicked Toys Ideal Use Christmas gifts, birthdays, craft days, stocking fillers, Wicked Toys Ideal Use Christmas gifts, birthdays, stationery gifts, Wicked Toys Material Non-toxic paints Material Durable plastic beads Material Paper, plastic Official Wiched Merchandise Yes Official Wiched Merchandise Yes Official Wiched Merchandise Yes Is this an official Wicked product? Yes, it’s an officially licensed Wicked stationery set designed for fans of the musical and upcoming film. What’s included in the set? You’ll receive a mirror notebook, 4 gel pens with toppers, 3 mini pens, 2 sticky note pads and 2 metallic sticker sheets — all Wicked-themed. Is it safe for children? Yes, it’s CE/UKCA certified and suitable for ages 3 + with adult supervision. Can it be used for school or journaling? Absolutely — it’s ideal for writing notes, journaling, sketching or creative expression. Is it suitable as a gift? Absolutely - it comes in a beautifully designed Wicked gift box ready to present for birthdays, Christmas or Wicked Merchandise fan collections. Unleash Creativity with the Wicked Diary Set Looking for a magical stationery gift for a Wicked fan? The Wicked Diary Set brings creativity to life with a touch of Broadway magic. Featuring an officially themed mirror notebook, gel pens with character toppers, stickers, and notepads, this enchanting set is perfect for journaling, drawing or writing down dreams. Packaged in a beautifully designed Wicked gift box, it’s ideal for fans of all ages — from young dreamers to lifelong musical enthusiasts. Each piece celebrates the artistry and imagination of the show, from the “Not Your Basic Witch” motif to the emerald-green design accents. CE and UKCA tested for safety, this officially licensed stationery set makes the perfect gift for birthdays, holidays or any day that needs a little creative magic. From magical journaling to creative expression, Wicked Diary Set lets fans celebrate their favourite story while capturing their own — one glittering note at a time. Wicked Diary Set – Official Stationery Gift for Fans What is it? A creative Wicked-themed stationery set featuring a mirror notebook, pens, stickers and sticky notes for imaginative journaling. Why is Wicked popular? Wicked is popular due to its unique retelling of a familiar story, relatable themes of friendship and being an outsider, and its iconic musical score. Dimensions 25x20x3cm Weight 0.38kg Material Cardboard, paper, pens Age 3+ Safety CE / UKCA Certified Use Cases Birthday gifts, Christmas presents, journaling, creative writing, stocking fillers kids, Wicked Merchandise
